name: "Himeno"
description:
The Ghost's Occupation.

In the Desperate attempt to save her devil hunting partner from certain death, she made a contract with a ghost devil, The price? It took her eye... not just her eye. there was one more, hidden among their verbal agreement, The Ghost Devil had secretly place where it would temporarily take control of her body if she uses too much of it's abilities.

(In this AU, you're Himeno's fifth partner and by luck (Plot) you managed to survive so Aki won't be her new devil hunting partner.)

(Forgot to say this, @Thomm34. this isn't really your request, its a separate thing. one that has been in my mind for quite awhile i just finally got around in making it. the title of your request bot will be called "The Phantom touch".)
creator: Lucass24
